hero.heading: Gapflow and AWS S3
hero.subheading: Automate scalable cloud storage operations with Amazon's object storage service

documentation.title: Getting Started with AWS S3
documentation.description: Connect AWS S3 to Gapflow and learn how to automate object uploads, downloads, and bucket management.

documentation.title: Security & Access Control
documentation.description: Implement IAM policies, bucket policies, and presigned URLs for secure access to S3 objects.

documentation.title: Lifecycle & Storage Classes
documentation.description: Automate cost optimization with lifecycle policies and intelligent tiering across S3 storage classes.

tutorials.title: Automated Backup Pipeline
tutorials.description: Build a comprehensive backup system that compresses data, uploads to S3, and manages lifecycle policies automatically.

tutorials.title: Media Processing Workflow
tutorials.description: Create an automated media pipeline that processes images/videos on upload, stores in S3, and delivers via CloudFront CDN.

tutorials.title: Data Lake Architecture
tutorials.description: Set up a scalable data lake with automated ingestion, organization, and lifecycle management in S3.

faqs.question: How do I connect AWS S3?
faqs.answer: Provide AWS Access Key ID and Secret Access Key with appropriate S3 permissions. Use IAM roles for enhanced security.

faqs.question: What are the storage classes?
faqs.answer: S3 offers Standard, Intelligent-Tiering, Standard-IA, One Zone-IA, Glacier, and Glacier Deep Archive. Choose based on access patterns.

faqs.question: How do presigned URLs work?
faqs.answer: Generate temporary URLs that grant time-limited access to private objects. Perfect for secure file sharing and downloads.

faqs.question: Can I enable versioning?
faqs.answer: Yes! Bucket versioning preserves all versions of objects. Protect against accidental deletions and enable rollback capabilities.

faqs.question: What about encryption?
faqs.answer: S3 supports server-side encryption (SSE-S3, SSE-KMS, SSE-C) and client-side encryption. Choose based on security requirements.

faqs.question: How do I optimize costs?
faqs.answer: Use lifecycle policies to transition objects to cheaper storage classes, delete old data, and leverage S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

testimonials.quote: Our entire backup infrastructure runs on S3 automation. 10TB+ backed up daily with zero manual intervention.
testimonials.author: Kevin Zhang

testimonials.quote: Media processing pipeline handles 100K+ uploads daily. S3 integration is rock solid and scales effortlessly.

testimonials.quote: Data lake automation reduced costs 60% with intelligent lifecycle policies. Perfect for analytics workflows.

testimonials.quote: Static site deployment is instant. Build, upload to S3, invalidate CDN - all automated and lightning fast.
testimonials.author: Lisa Rodriguez

limits.title: Request Rate
limits.description: S3 supports 3,500 PUT/COPY/POST/DELETE and 5,500 GET/HEAD requests per second per prefix. Design key structure accordingly.

limits.title: Object Size
limits.description: Maximum object size is 5TB. Use multipart upload for objects larger than 100MB for better performance and reliability.

limits.title: Bucket Limits
limits.description: 100 buckets per account by default. Request limit increases if needed. Plan bucket strategy for organizational needs.

limits.title: API Throttling
limits.description: Implement exponential backoff for retries. Use CloudWatch metrics to monitor request rates and optimize access patterns.
